title: feat: merge polly API into bot process
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: One brain, two voices
gist.blurb: We've merged the Polly API directly into the Discord bot process. Now they share the same memory, tools, and event loop for maximum efficiency.
gist.summary: Merged the standalone Polly API service into the main Discord bot process to unify embeddings, tools, and execution logic.
gist.impact: This reduces overhead and ensures the API and Bot behave identically, providing a more stable experience for 7M+ users.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot celebrating the unification of two systems. A central server rack (representing the unified process) is blooming with life, showing that the two sides are now growing from the same root.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the monitor robot standing together in front of a large server rack that is overgrown with glowing lime green (#ecf874) vines and flowers. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Pixel text on screen: 'SYSTEM UNIFIED'. Nostalgic, technical, and emotionally warm.
